title: Improving Skills
description: A modification in the RPG genre that will add its own equipment rarity system and more to the game.
body:
# Improving Skills
Improving Skills is a modification in the RPG genre, which will add to the game a system of equipment rarity, a improvement system and much more.

The modification is in the early stages of development. Many things are being tested, and sometimes bugs can occur. If you want to reduce the chance of encountering bugs, I suggest you wait for the release versions. And if you want to help in development, download the alpha and beta versions, and don't forget about feedback in the mentioned messenger.
